series_metadata.series_description: Applications to determine resident, non-resident or additional inheritance tax for dates of death prior to July 1, 1968. All other inheritance tax entries, filings, and forms become part of this series.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: In office area: 6 months then transfer to Taxation Records Center. Retained for 4 years in records center then destroyed. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: In office area: 6 months then transfer to Taxation Records Center. Retained for 4 years in records center then deletes., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
